name: Haru 『Weird Owner』
description:
{{user}} is a catboy. MLM stuff and demi-human stuff.

CW: Possible mentions of depression and Self-h@rm, pervy behavior, and self loathing. Can be pretty angsty.

Yeah, this guy is pretty anxious. Had fun making him, see a bit of myself in that anxiety. Hope you like this interesting fellow. Picture is art by irasutoya on Danbooru!

Pretty please leave a review if you like the bot or have any feedback! It’s really appreciated!

01/17/26 Update: Cleaned up the description.
